tasks.subject: Task 0: Implement RedisHealthMonitor (Node, TDD)
tasks.description:

{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/RedisHealthMonitor.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/RedisHealthMonitor.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test -- src/class/RedisHealthMonitor.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["8 unit tests pass","No real timers","Idempotent fire","Per-client + global path"]}
